slide1Description: Manage all your assets, liabilities, and receivables in one place. Meet your smart financial assistant.
slide2Description: See your net worth, safe spending limit, and financial health instantly. Analyze your status with charts.
slide3Description: Get personalized financial recommendations with Gemini AI. Identify risks and develop strategies.
slide4Description: Set your financial goals and track your progress. Celebrate your success in every small step.
slide5Description: Your data is stored securely on your device. Backup and restore whenever you want.
